overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dense cyberpunk city. The player ascends a ramp beneath massive elevated highways, traverses narrow neon-lit market streets, and emerges onto a sunlit waterfront boulevard with heavy traffic and futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the massive elevated highway structure
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to shadow as we move under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking up a wooden ramp beneath a massive elevated highway structure, moving from sunlight into shadow

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with multiple levels towering overhead
weathered concrete wall with graffiti and metal pipes
rusted metal handrail along the left side of the ramp
rusted metal handrail along the right side of the ramp
wooden plank walkway with orange-brown coloring ascending under the structure

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wooden ramp beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The scene transitions from bright daylight to shadow as we move under the concrete overpass, with metal railings lining the walkway and palm trees visible in the distance.

events.description: passing market stalls and neon signs in the dimly lit underpass
approaching the exit of the underpass, natural light increasing ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow market street tucked beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near market stall on the left side

entered.detail: underside of the massive highway creating a dark tunnel effect
makeshift vendor stalls with tarps and neon lighting
black garbage bags piled near the wall
large concrete blocks lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow market street tucked beneath the overpass. The area is dimly lit with neon signs and advertisements glowing in the shadows. Market stalls line the left side while concrete barriers and trash bags are visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food stall area with neon signage

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into a semi-covered area with food stalls
passing by a food stall with prominent red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: passing by a food stall with red lanterns and neon signage, moving from shadow into brighter light

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food counter under red lanterns

entered.detail: street food vendor stall with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead
bright orange building wall with green neon window lighting
large vertical digital screen displaying a pink neon face advertisement

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark underpass into a semi-covered area featuring a food stall with prominent red lanterns. The lighting brightens significantly, revealing an orange building facade with green neon signs and a large digital billboard displaying a face.

events.description: turning onto a narrow walkway alongside a canal with green railings
scaffolding structure temporarily blocks the view of the sky and buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow path beside a canal with scaffolding overhead and green railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the narrow path away from the camera

entered.detail: narrow waterway running parallel to the walkway with reflections
green painted metal safety railings along the canal edge
orange metal construction scaffolding towering over the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
tall yellow illuminated advertisement screen

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrow walkway alongside a canal, bordered by green metal railings. Scaffolding structures overhead partially obscure the sky, while graffiti-covered walls line the left side. Palm trees are visible across the water.

events.description: emerging from the narrow canal path onto a wide open city street with traffic
crossing the street as futuristic vehicles pass by on the left

agents.ego_description: emerging from the narrow path onto a busy city street and crossing toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving along the street
pedestrian in dark clothing walking on the sidewalk parallel to the road

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with crosswalk markings and traffic signals
yellow and red striped concrete barriers blocking part of the road
massive screen displaying advertisements on the side of a building
curved highway ramps rising into the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow path onto a wide, sunlit city street with moderate traffic. Futuristic vehicles drive along the road as the player crosses toward the sidewalk. Large digital billboards and modern glass buildings dominate the skyline, with elevated highway ramps visible overhead.

events.description: transitioning to walking alongside moving traffic on the waterfront boulevard
steam vents release vapor on the left side of the road near the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk with heavy traffic on the left and water on the right, heading toward the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: multiple futuristic cars and a bus driving along the waterfront road

entered.detail: wide multi-lane road running alongside the water with heavy vehicle traffic
body of water reflecting the sunset and city lights
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
steam rising from grates on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a waterfront boulevard with heavy traffic on the left and a canal on the right. The elevated highway structure arches overhead, casting long shadows across the road. Steam vents release vapor along the sidewalk, and the futuristic city skyline stretches into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an urban underpass into the bright, expansive scale of a futuristic waterfront boulevard. It begins by ascending a wooden ramp beneath a massive concrete highway, transitioning from daylight into deep shadow as the camera enters a narrow market street filled with glowing neon signs and dim advertisements. The scene then brightens as it passes a food stall with red lanterns and a large digital billboard, moving along a graffiti-lined canal walkway beneath overhead scaffolding. As the path opens up, the camera emerges from the narrow corridor onto a wide, sunlit city street populated by futuristic vehicles and towering glass skyscrapers. Finally, the movement settles onto a bustling waterfront boulevard where steam vents release vapor along the sidewalk and the massive highway structure arches overhead against a distant city skyline.
